arts.ttl: Crystal Palace team news: Cheick Doucoure set to fill void left by injured midfielder Will Hughes
arts.sum: “Adam [Wharton] won’t be available with Stockport, Leicester and West Ham for the three-game week,” said Glasner. The midfielder, who captained the side in the absence of Marc Guehi against Southampton, suffered a foot injury, even though he played through the majority of the second half.

arts.ttl: ‘We’ve found our targets already’ - Crystal Palace boss Glasner on January transfer window
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has stated the desire to sign two players this month while avoiding speaking directly on any names. We can’t and won’t, but we are looking for players who fit into our system.

arts.ttl: Glasner on Doucouré start and Riad & França recoveries
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Cheick Doucouré’s ‘moment has come’, with the 24-year-old midfielder set to start Crystal Palace’s opening match of 2025 against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Fofana could miss rest of season
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Wesley Fofana could miss the rest of the season with a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Romano CONFIRMS shock interest in Chelsea summer signing
arts.sum: Napoli and other clubs are showing an interest in Chelsea summer signing Renato Veiga, according to Fabrizio Romano. And according to Fabrizio Romano, he could even make a swift exit from Chelsea as Napoli and several other unnamed clubs are showing an interest in the defender.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals plan for Chelsea's new January arrival
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca reveals the plan for Argentine centre-back Aaron Anselmino.

arts.ttl: Liverpool set price for Ben Doak as Crystal Palace chase winger
arts.sum: The Scotland winger has impressed on loan at Middlesbrough and Palace are interested in bringing him to Selhurst Park

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace - Premier League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up against Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject Palace and Ipswich approaches for winger Doak
arts.sum: Liverpool have knocked back approaches from Crystal Palace and Ipswich for winger Ben Doak.

arts.ttl: What Wolves forward Matheus Cunha said about Chelsea back in August as he's linked with January move
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca’s Chelsea team hasn’t struggled to find the back of the net in the first half of the season, but there’s still transfer speculation...
